channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 40,000 people under evacuation orders for a chemical tank leak in Southern California
item.description: About 40,000 people are under evacuation orders and schools have shut down in Southern California due to a hazardous chemical leak.

item.title: Evacuation centers fill up in southern California as efforts continue to cool damaged chemical tank
Investigators looking for cause of fatal New York explosion that also wounded over 30 firefighters
